View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-146 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE DIRECTOR OF BUDGET AND FISCAL SERVICES TO ISSUE AND SELL IN ONE OR MORE SERIES NOT TO EXCEED $11,000,000 PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF GENERAL OBLIGATION BONDS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU FOR FINANCING THE AMOUNT APPROPRIATED IN ORDINANCE NO. 26-_ (ALSO REFERRED TO, UPON ITS APPROVAL, AS BILL 23 (2026), CD2, FD1, AND AS MAY BE FURTHER AMENDED) OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU FOR THE PURPOSE OF FINANCING CAPITAL COSTS OF THE HONOLULU RAIL TRANSIT PROJECT.

Recommendation of the adoption of the Resolution authorizing the issuance and sale not to exceed principal amount of General Obligation Bonds to finance the capital costs of the Honolulu Rail Transit Project (“HRTP”); Capital Budget Ordinance for Fiscal Year July 1, 2026 to June 30, 2027; Honolulu Authority for Rapid Transportation (“HART’); Budget and Fiscal Services.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-145 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE DIRECTOR OF BUDGET AND FISCAL SERVICES TO ISSUE AND SELL IN ONE OR MORE SERIES NOT TO EXCEED $205,000,000 PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF GENERAL OBLIGATION BONDS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU FOR FINANCING THE AMOUNTS APPROPRIATED IN CERTAIN CAPITAL BUDGET ORDINANCES OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU SPECIFIED IN SUCH CAPITAL BUDGET ORDINANCES.

Recommendation of the adoption of the Resolution authorizing the issuance and sale of not to exceed principal amount of General Obligation Bonds; Capital Budget Ordinance for Fiscal Year July 1, 2026 to June 30, 2027; Budget and Fiscal Services.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-147 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRANSPORTATION, LODGING, MEALS, AND REGISTRATION FEE, VALUED AT $5,600, TO THE CITY FROM THE NATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF STATE PROCUREMENT OFFICIALS (NASPO) FOR TWO STAFF MEMBERS FROM THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU TO ATTEND THE NASPO REACH CONFERENCE AND TRAINING EVENT IN OKLAHOMA CITY, OKLAHOMA, FROM JULY 21-25, 2026.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL012(26) (Honolulu): Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.
entry.content:
RELATING TO SEWERS, DRAINAGE, AND CESSPOOLS.

Requires a department to be designated by the Mayor to make certain information relating to the City's wastewater system and separate storm sewer system publicly accessible. Establishes reporting requirements.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL028(26) (Honolulu): Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE LEGISLATIVE BUDGET FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2026 TO JUNE 30, 2027.

Appropriates funds for the Legislative Budget for Fiscal Year 2027.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL024(26) (Honolulu): Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE ISSUANCE AND SALE OF GENERAL OBLIGATION BONDS AND BOND ANTICIPATION NOTES OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU IN A MAXIMUM PRINCIPAL AMOUNT EQUAL TO THE AGGREGATE OF THE AMOUNTS APPROPRIATED IN THE CAPITAL BUDGET ORDINANCE OF SAID CITY AND COUNTY FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2027, AND SPECIFIED IN SAID ORDINANCE TO BE FINANCED FROM THE PROCEEDS OF THE SALE OF SUCH BONDS AND TO BE EXPENDED FROM THE GENERAL IMPROVEMENT BOND FUND, THE HIGHWAY IMPROVEMENT BOND FUND, SOLID WASTE IMPROVEMENT BOND FUND, THE HOUSING DEVELOPMENT SPECIAL FUND OR THE TAXABLE GENERAL IMPROVEMENT BOND FUND.

The bill authorizes the issuance and sale of general obligation bonds and bond anticipation notes of the City and County of Honolulu in a maximum principal amount equal to the aggregate of the amounts of general obligation bonds appropriated in the capital budget ordinance for Fiscal Year 2027.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL023(26) (Honolulu): Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE EXECUTIVE CAPITAL BUDGET AND PROGRAM FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2026 TO JUNE 30, 2027.

Appropriates funds for the Executive Capital Budget and Program for Fiscal Year 2027.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL022(26) (Honolulu): Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE EXECUTIVE OPERATING BUDGET AND PROGRAM FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2026 TO JUNE 30, 2027.

Appropriates funds for the Executive Operating Budget for Fiscal Year 2027.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL070(25) (Honolulu): Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.
entry.content:
RELATING TO PARKS AND PLAYGROUNDS.

Allows certain lands that are provided in perpetuity or dedicated for use as dog parks to be credited toward satisfying the requirements for the provision or dedication of lands for park and playground purposes under ROH Section 22-7.5. Limits the amount of dog park lands to be credited to up to 10 percent of the total park and playground lands required.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-143 (Honolulu) — INTRO

RELATING TO THE APPOINTMENT OF LUCA CUNIBERTI TO SERVE ON THE RATE COMMISSION OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU.

entry.title: BILL034(26) (Honolulu): Returned approved.
entry.content:
RELATING TO FLOOD HAZARD AREAS.

Amends ROH Chapter 21A to update requirements and construction standards for consistency with the requirements of the FEMA, to remain eligible for participation in the National Flood Insurance Program and the Community Rating System, and make other housekeeping amendments. Takes effect on June 10, 2026.

Latest action: Returned approved.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: BILL043(26) (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
TO REZONE LAND SITUATED AT PAʻALAʻA KAI, WAIALUA, OʻAHU, HAWAIʻI.

Latest action: Introduced.

entry.title: New: BILL042(26) (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
TO AMEND A PORTION OF THE STATE LAND USE DISTRICT BOUNDARY MAP (KAHUKU QUADRANGLE) FROM THE AGRICULTURAL DISTRICT TO THE URBAN DISTRICT FOR CERTAIN LANDS SITUATED IN THE KOʻOLAU LOA DEVELOPMENT PLAN AREA, LĀ‘IE, OʻAHU, HAWAIʻI.

Latest action: Introduced.
